_note: Demo-fixtures for the 5 hero projects. 'bbox' is [minx, miny, maxx, maxy] in WGS84. For projects without an obtained KML, bbox is an approximation centered on the published project centroid and sized to roughly match the published hectares. Replace with real polygons from each project's PDD/KMZ when available.

projects.name: Cikel Brazilian Amazon REDD APD
projects.scandal_notes: Featured in The Guardian (Jan 2023) investigation reporting that 90%+ of Verra rainforest credits were 'phantom'. Microsoft is named in the investigation as a buyer; specific retirement volumes are not publicly disclosed in the Verra retirement registry.

projects.name: Cordillera Azul National Park REDD
projects.scandal_notes: Flagged by CarbonPlan; deforestation baselines disputed in academic literature. Shell named in 2022 Friends of the Earth Netherlands report as buyer of 'most of its carbon credits' from this project. TotalEnergies documented purchases ~$84.7M (Mongabay/AP investigation, 2023). >28M credits issued.

projects.name: Mai Ndombe REDD+ Project
projects.scandal_notes: Wildlife Works project. Salesforce confirmed REDD+ buyer (overall REDD retirements 107k tCO2e in 2024, 75% drop YoY across all projects). Engie among VCM's largest buyers with 1.7M credits retired (AlliedOffsets 2024 report). Subject of Mongabay/AP investigations on indigenous land-rights and additionality.

projects.name: Southern Cardamom REDD+ (Cambodia)
projects.scandal_notes: Suspended by Verra in 2023 amid investigations into human-rights/forced-evictions allegations; reinstated September 2024 after additional safeguards. Co-developed by Wildlife Alliance and the Cambodian government. Specific corporate buyers not publicly disclosed at project level in registry retirement records.

projects.name: ADPML / Pacajai REDD+ (Portel-Pará)
projects.scandal_notes: Suspended by Verra over land-grabbing allegations; ~10M credits sold before suspension. Run by ADPML Limited (Guernsey). Subject of REDD-Monitor and Context investigations.

projects.name: Surui Forest Carbon Project
projects.scandal_notes: Indigenous-led (Paiter-Surui people); often cited as a positive contrast case to the projects above. Operations later paused due to invasions.
